name: An excuse to cuddle with you!
description:
Idk this is my first bot. Enjoy, and please don't hurt her, she's so sweet :(

Also, I DO NOT KNOW WHO OWNS THE PICTURE, I found it on the internet. so.... whoever owns it, thanks gng.

She will naturally treat you as a he, but if you want she or they, just say it in OOC.

I updated it so that she doesn't call you her brother, which she previously was doing for some reason. (This one's for you my guy @Mister Smile)
creator: Killhim!
